scale: 0-100 honest self-assessment of LocalAIFactory as a local-first software reasoning platform; not externally audited

codeUnderstanding.note: CodeGraph unchanged; block extractor adds a second view of the same source.

codeComposition.note: NEW: 16-block catalogue + composer; 100% on a 20-task real-life composition benchmark; honestly flags missing bricks.

knowledgeEngine.note: 45 packs / 1195 items, verified; 6 new V2 definition/pattern packs.

modelRouting.note: GPU-aware orchestration: run queue, budget, bounded retry, telemetry, GPU signal; still graceful without GPU/Ollama.

pythonOrchestration.note: NEW: safe C# bridge (allowlist, JSON I/O, timeout, graceful when absent) + stdlib worker skeleton. Full ML/scrape workers need a local venv.

safeAgentExecution.note: Model-driven plan->risk->isolated apply->build/test->rollback->knowledge proposal; hallucinated/forbidden patches blocked. Tested with a fake planner.

knowledgeGrowth.note: NEW: safe scraper core (allowlist, cache-by-hash, citation, dedup, clean-room summarise, human-approval proposals). Network fetch is the Python worker's job (deferred).

experienceMemory.note: Now fed by the model-driven runner's success/failure records.

localFirstOperation.note: All ~238 reasoning-family tests pass with no Ollama/GPU/Python/network.

productionReadiness.note: Gate V3 NEAR_GA unchanged; V2 is local-core, not production-hardened.

externalBlockers.note: Unchanged: customer pilot, external security review, CA TLS, SSO/OIDC.

result: NOT the 75 stretch (73.6) but a real, tested step up — composition, safe model-driven patching, a Python bridge, GPU-aware orchestration, and a safe knowledge-growth core were all added and proven.
